features.name: initial block on multi-bit register with partial bit usage
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit register with an initial value assignment, where only a subrange of bits is used in downstream logic, leaving some bits unused and subject to optimization removal

features.name: bit-range selection from wider register in combinational logic
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block that reads only a subset of bits from a wider register, creating unused MSB bits that synthesizers may optimize away

features.name: initial value on register with sequential and combinational consumers
features.description: Code should include a register that is initialized via an initial block, updated in a sequential always block (posedge clk), and read in a separate combinational always block
